response: Hello everyone, I am writing to let you know that Friday will be my last day at the company. I want to thank you all for the incredible support and great memories we have shared over the years. Working alongside such a talented group of people has been a truly rewarding experience. I would love to stay in touch, so please feel free to connect with me on LinkedIn or reach out to my personal email. Wishing you all continued success, I hope our paths cross again in the future.
